_comment: Live-texturing demo arrangement: a Const feeds a texture SPEC into a TextureApply node, which emits a renderer-neutral set_material op observed by a Log sink. Copy this file where a LiveHost watches (e.g. godot/live/) and edit the spec's colors/kind/cell while the graph runs - the op re-emits with no restart. Paste the emitted op into sandbox_params.json material_ops to re-skin a placed block live.
